stem: A circle in the xy-plane has a diameter with endpoints (−3, 1) and (−3, 17). An equation of this circle is (x + 3)2 + (y − 9)2 = r2, where r is a positive constant. What is the value of r?
rationale: The diameter length is the distance from (−3, 1) to (−3, 17), which is |17 − 1| = 16. The radius is half the diameter, so r = 8.
